# CWE-89 variant: renamed identifiers / wrapper (taint core oracle)
lang: go
file: CWE-89-renamed-vulnerable.go
variant: stdlib
---
package sample

import (
	"database/sql"
	"net/http"
)

func HandleSearch(db *sql.DB, w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
	userInput := r.URL.Query().Get("q")
	// renamed locals — still a classic string-concat SQL sink
	queryText := "SELECT * FROM items WHERE name = '" + userInput + "'"
	rows, err := db.Query(queryText)
	if err != nil {
		http.Error(w, err.Error(), 500)
		return
	}
	defer rows.Close()
	_ = rows
}
